name: Prince Edward High School
description: Prince Edward High School is a place to play pickleball in Farmville, VA. There are 6 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Worsham Baptist Church
description: Worsham Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Farmville, VA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
